match.userMessage:
Modern social-first product photography in bright natural window light with clean directional shadows, SCARLETT in loose linen shirt seated at a crisp white vanity, hand reaching into a minimal white box with fingers poised on the matte coral tube, the lipstick catching direct light and casting a clean shadow on the marble surface, pale tile shelves in background holding linen tissue, glass of water and single white flower, minimal modern interior with high-key airy atmosphere, shallow depth of field emphasizing tactile surfaces and crisp whites, eye-level angle with slight overhead tilt, fresh sensory mood with true-to-life color and subtle warmth in highlights.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - Crisp white vanity and pale tile bathroom shelf areas with marble surfaces
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
